calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-06-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WEDNESDAY, SEP-06-2006: MICHAEL C. HALL, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF JOHN MEHAN; LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY RICHARD HURLBURT, ESQ. APPEARS ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT DEREK DESJARDINS, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT THIS DAY.
Judge Pro Tem James Green; JoAnn Bryce, CSR; Clerk M.Manzella:
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD; THE CASE SETTLES; PARTIES ENTER INTO A SIGNED SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WHICH IS NOT FILED WITH THE COURT; TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT ARE PLACED ON THE RECORD AND INCLUDE THE FOLLOWING WITH REGARD TO THE RESIDENTIAL PREMISES LOCATED AT 2330 LARKIN STREET, APARTMENT 24, SAN FRANCISCO, CA: Defendant Derek Desjardins shall vacate the Premises on or before SEP-30-2006; Defendant shall relinquish all keys to the Premises as he vacates & shall leave the Premises in good, clean and undamaged condition, ordinary wear and tear excepted; Defendant shall remove all personal property from the premises as he vacates; any items of personal property remaining after defendant has vacated may be disposed of by Plaintiff without liability; defendant stipulates that no person claiming a right to possession of the premises shall remain in the premises after Sept-30-06; defendant shall have defaulted on his obligation under this agreement to deliver possession of premises if any such person remains; plaintiffs do not waive any claims for damages against Defendant; Plaintiffs will waive all accrued and unpaid rent and unlawful detainer damages for the period from Sep-01-06 through & including Sep-30-06 in the amount of $1240.00 & will file a dismissal with prejudice within three days; each party to bear his own attorneys fees and costs; Defendant may remain in possession until Oct-31-06 if he pays $1240.00 before Oct-01-06; defendant may remain until Nov-30-06 if $1240.00 paid prior to Nov-01-06; Plntf. agrees to dismiss Cases #05-614302 & #05-616877 forthwith; Defendant to vacate no later than Nov-30-06; parties agree a final mutual release; both understand & agree to terms.
